creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
Thank you guys!

Silly problem as it turns out, sorry, my mistake! :-(

There is a /boot/kernel/i915kms.ko that shadows /boot/modules/i915kms.ko. The default one /boot/kernel/i915kms.ko does not work with my card, but when I explicitly load /boot/modules/i915.ko IT WORKS!!! THANK YOU!!! :-)

Some folks stated that this card is supported since 2018 so I considered it will be supported out of the box in GENERIC / RELEASE, my mistake.

Yes I never run X as root, that was just for testing (in case my standard user was missing some permissions).


By the way I heard about WAYLAND as replacement for XORG. I am using new Enlightenment WM that also supports it. Is WAYLAND supported on FreeBSD and if so where can I read about it? You are most experienced people with first hand knowledge sorry for the question here in PR :-)
